title: pentameris pungens
intro: Pentameris pungens, also known as needle grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pentameris pungens include its use as a natural remedy for fever reduction, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Pentameris pungens can be made by infusing the dried leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oils in aromatherapy and topical applications.
